name: Mocha Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Butter or margarine, COLD, cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions: Prepare Chocolate Cookie Crust: Crush the wafers in a food processor or blender to form fine crumbs. In a medium bowl, mix the crumbs, butter, and cinnamon until evenly blended. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside. Heat the oven to 325°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and butter until smooth and fluffy. Gradually beat in sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in cocoa and vanilla. Dissolve instant coffee in water; stir into the cheese mixture. Add sour cream and blend well. Pour the cheese mixture into the pan. Bake for 30 minutes. Turn off the oven; leave the cheesecake in the oven for an additional 15 minutes without opening the door. Remove from the oven. Cool on a wire rack. Cover and chill. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
